我现在开始写入新目录：`awesome-codex-skills-raw-en/`。每个 skill 会变成一个可直接打开的 Markdown 文件，`_index.md` 负责串起索引和导入信息。

content.title:
set -euo pipefail
SRC=/tmp/awesome-codex-skills
DEST='/Users/bytedance/Documents/Obsidian Vault/awesome-codex-skills-raw-en'
COMMIT=$(git -C "$SRC" rev-parse HEAD)
rm -rf "$DEST"
mkdir -p "$DEST/top-level" "$DEST/composio-skills"
cd "$SRC"
find . -name 'SKILL.md' -type f | sort | while IFS= read -r file; do
  rel=${file#./}
  skill_dir=${rel%/SKILL.md}
  if [[ $skill_dir == composio-skills/* ]]; then
    out="$DEST/composio-skills/${skill_dir#composio-skills/}.md"
  else
    out="$DEST/top-level/${skill_dir}.md"
  fi
  mkdir -p "$(dirname "$out")"
  cp "$file" "$out"
done
TOTAL=$(find "$DEST" -path "$DEST/_index.md" -prune -o -name '*.md' -type f -print | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
{
  printf '# Awesome Codex Skills Raw (English)\n\n'
  printf -- '- Source: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills\n'
  printf -- '- Commit: `%s`\n' "$COMMIT"
  printf -- '- Imported: 2026-05-25\n'
  printf -- '- Scope: all repository `SKILL.md` files only. Content files are copied as raw English Markdown with original frontmatter preserved.\n'
  printf -- '- Total: %s skill files.\n\n' "$TOTAL"
  printf '## Review Map\n\n'
  printf -- '- `top-level/`: curated skills from repository root.\n'
  printf -- '- `composio-skills/`: Composio automation skills from `composio-skills/*/SKILL.md`.\n'
  printf -- '- Suggested Chinese pass: create a sibling directory with the same relative paths, translate body text, and preserve `name`, `requires`, and source links in frontmatter.\n\n'
  printf '## Skills\n\n'
  find . -name 'SKILL.md' -type f | sort | while IFS= read -r file; do
    rel=${file#./}
    skill_dir=${rel%/SKILL.md}
    skill_name=${skill_dir##*/}
    if [[ $skill_dir == composio-skills/* ]]; then
      link="composio-skills/${skill_dir#composio-skills/}"
    else
      link="top-level/${skill_dir}"
    fi
    printf -- '- [[%s|%s]] - `%s`\n' "$link" "$skill_name" "$rel"
  done
} > "$DEST/_index.md"

def protect_inline(s):
    parts = []
    def repl(m):
        parts.append(m.group(0))
        return f'@@P{len(parts)-1}@@'
    # inline code, markdown links, raw urls
    s2 = re.sub(r'`[^`]*`', repl, s)
    s2 = re.sub(r'\[[^\]]+\]\([^\)]+\)', repl, s2)
    s2 = re.sub(r'https?://\S+', repl, s2)
    return s2, parts

def unprotect(s, parts):
    for i, p in enumerate(parts):
        s = s.replace(f'@@P{i}@@', p)
    return s

    # Common table headers and short cells.

            protected = re.sub(r'(?<![A-Za-z0-9_])' + re.escape(en) + r'(?![A-Za-z0-9_])', zh, protected)

def translate_heading(line):
    m = re.match(r'^(#{1,6})\s+(.*?)(\s*)$', line)
    if not m:
        return None
    hashes, title, tail = m.groups()
    if title in heading_map:
        return f'{hashes} {heading_map[title]}{tail}'
    if title in subheading_exact:
        return f'{hashes} {subheading_exact[title]}{tail}'
    # Preserve app/product names but translate common generated heading words.
    t = title
    t = re.sub(r'^(.+?) Automation via Rube MCP$', r'\1 Automation via Rube MCP（自动化）', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^(.+?) Automation$', r'\1 Automation（自动化）', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^Step (\d+): Discover Available Tools$', r'步骤 \1：发现可用工具', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^Step (\d+): Check Connection$', r'步骤 \1：检查连接', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^Step (\d+): Execute Tools$', r'步骤 \1：执行工具', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Manage (.+)$', r'\1. 管理 \2', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Create (.+)$', r'\1. 创建 \2', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Update (.+)$', r'\1. 更新 \2', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Read (.+)$', r'\1. 读取 \2', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Format (.+)$', r'\1. 格式化 \2', t)
    t = translate_sentence(t)
    return f'{hashes} {t}{tail}'

def translate_table(line):
    if '|' not in line or not line.lstrip().startswith('|'):
        return None
    if re.match(r'^\s*\|?\s*:?-{2,}:?\s*(\|\s*:?-{2,}:?\s*)+\|?\s*$', line):
        return line
    trailing = '\n' if line.endswith('\n') else ''
    raw = line[:-1] if trailing else line
    parts = raw.split('|')
    out = []
    for i, cell in enumerate(parts):
        if i == 0 or i == len(parts)-1:
            out.append(cell)
        else:
            left = re.match(r'^\s*', cell).group(0)
            right = re.search(r'\s*$', cell).group(0)
            core = cell.strip()
            out.append(left + translate_sentence(core) + right)
    return '|'.join(out) + trailing

def translate_yaml_line(line):
    if line.startswith('description:'):
        prefix, val = line.split(':', 1)
        stripped = val.strip()
        quote = ''
        if len(stripped) >= 2 and stripped[0] == stripped[-1] and stripped[0] in ('"', "'"):
            quote = stripped[0]
            inner = stripped[1:-1]
        else:
            inner = stripped
        zh = translate_sentence(inner).replace('"', '\\"')
        if quote:
            return f'{prefix}: {quote}{zh}{quote}\n'
        return f'{prefix}: {zh}\n'
    if 'short-description:' in line:
        prefix, val = line.split(':', 1)
        stripped = val.strip()
        zh = translate_sentence(stripped.strip('"\''))
        return f'{prefix}: {zh}\n'
    return line

def translate_text(text):
    lines = text.splitlines(True)
    out = []
    in_code = False
    in_yaml = False
    yaml_count = 0
    for idx, line in enumerate(lines):
        stripped = line.strip()
        if idx == 0 and stripped == '---':
            in_yaml = True
            yaml_count = 1
            out.append(line)
            continue
        if in_yaml:
            if stripped == '---':
                yaml_count += 1
                if yaml_count == 2:
                    in_yaml = False
                out.append(line)
            else:
                out.append(translate_yaml_line(line))
            continue
        if stripped.startswith('```'):
            in_code = not in_code
            out.append(line)
            continue
        if in_code:
            out.append(line)
            continue
        h = translate_heading(line)
        if h is not None:
            out.append(h)
            continue
        tbl = translate_table(line)
        if tbl is not None:
            out.append(tbl)
            continue
        # Preserve thematic separators exactly.
        if stripped in ('---', '***'):
            out.append(line)
            continue
        out.append(translate_sentence(line))
    return ''.join(out)

count = 0
for src in sorted(SRC.glob('*.md')):
    dest = DEST / src.name
    dest.write_text(translate_text(src.read_text(encoding='utf-8')), encoding='utf-8')
    count += 1
print(f'translated composio files: {count}')

def translate_table(line):
    if '|' not in line or not line.lstrip().startswith('|'):
        return None
    if re.match(r'^\s*\|?\s*:?-{2,}:?\s*(\|\s*:?-{2,}:?\s*)+\|?\s*$', line):
        return line
    trailing = '\n' if line.endswith('\n') else ''
    raw = line[:-1] if trailing else line
    parts = raw.split('|')
    out = []
    for i, cell in enumerate(parts):
        if i == 0 or i == len(parts)-1:
            out.append(cell)
        else:
            left = re.match(r'^\s*', cell).group(0)
            right = re.search(r'\s*$', cell).group(0)
            core = cell.strip()
            out.append(left + translate_sentence(core) + right)
    return '|'.join(out) + trailing

def translate_yaml_line(line):
    if line.startswith('description:'):
        prefix, val = line.split(':', 1)
        stripped = val.strip()
        quote = ''
        if len(stripped) >= 2 and stripped[0] == stripped[-1] and stripped[0] in ('"', "'"):
            quote = stripped[0]
            inner = stripped[1:-1]
        else:
            inner = stripped
        zh = translate_sentence(inner).replace('"', '\\"')
        if quote:
            return f'{prefix}: {quote}{zh}{quote}\n'
        return f'{prefix}: {zh}\n'
    if 'short-description:' in line:
        prefix, val = line.split(':', 1)
        stripped = val.strip()
        zh = translate_sentence(stripped.strip('"\''))
        return f'{prefix}: {zh}\n'
    return line

def translate_text(text):
    lines = text.splitlines(True)
    out = []
    in_code = False
    in_yaml = False
    yaml_count = 0
    for idx, line in enumerate(lines):
        stripped = line.strip()
        if idx == 0 and stripped == '---':
            in_yaml = True
            yaml_count = 1
            out.append(line)
            continue
        if in_yaml:
            if stripped == '---':
                yaml_count += 1
                if yaml_count == 2:
                    in_yaml = False
                out.append(line)
            else:
                out.append(translate_yaml_line(line))
            continue
        if stripped.startswith('```'):
            in_code = not in_code
            out.append(line)
            continue
        if in_code:
            out.append(line)
            continue
        h = translate_heading(line)
        if h is not None:
            out.append(h)
            continue
        tbl = translate_table(line)
        if tbl is not None:
            out.append(tbl)
            continue
        # Preserve thematic separators exactly.
        if stripped in ('---', '***'):
            out.append(line)
            continue
        out.append(translate_sentence(line))
    return ''.join(out)

count = 0
for src in sorted(SRC.glob('*.md')):
    dest = DEST / src.name
    dest.write_text(translate_text(src.read_text(encoding='utf-8')), encoding='utf-8')
    count += 1
print(f'translated composio files: {count}')

                       r'运行任何工作流之前，确认连接状态显示为 ACTIVE', protected)
    protected = re.sub(r'^Always include (@@P\d+@@) in (@@P\d+@@) calls, even if empty \((@@P\d+@@)\)$',
                       r'调用 \2 时始终包含 \1，即使为空（\3）', protected)
    protected = re.sub(r'^Tool schemas change\. Never hardcode tool slugs or arguments without calling (@@P\d+@@)$',
                       r'Tool schema 可能变化。未调用 \1 前，不要硬编码 tool slug 或参数', protected)
    protected = re.sub(r'^Verify (@@P\d+@@) shows ACTIVE status before executing tools$',
                       r'执行工具前，确认 \1 显示 ACTIVE 状态', protected)
    protected = re.sub(r'^Use exact field names and types from the search results$',
                       r'使用搜索结果中的准确字段名和类型', protected)
    protected = re.sub(r'^Reuse session IDs within a workflow\. Generate new ones for new workflows$',
                       r'在同一个工作流中复用 session ID；新的工作流再生成新的 session ID', protected)
    protected = re.sub(r'^Check responses for pagination tokens and continue fetching until complete$',
                       r'检查响应里的分页 token，并持续拉取直到完成', protected)
    protected = re.sub(r'^Add (.+?) as an MCP server in your client configuration\.$',
                       r'在客户端配置中把 \1 添加为 MCP server。', protected)
    protected = re.sub(r'^Use (.+?) to (.+)$', r'使用 \1 来\2', protected)
    protected = re.sub(r'^Call (.+?) with (.+)$', r'使用 \2 调用 \1', protected)

    # Markdown emphasis labels.
    label_map = {
        '**Toolkit docs:**': '**Toolkit 文档：**',
        '**Toolkit docs**:': '**Toolkit 文档**：',
        '**Tool:**': '**工具：**',
        '**Tools:**': '**工具：**',
        '**Key Parameters:**': '**关键参数：**',
        '**Example:**': '**示例：**',
        '**Examples:**': '**示例：**',
        '**Steps:**': '**步骤：**',
        '**Supporting Tools:**': '**辅助工具：**',
        '**Common Patterns:**': '**常见模式：**',
    }
    for k, v in label_map.items():
        if protected.startswith(k):
            protected = v + protected[len(k):]

    # Common table headers and short cells.
    exact_cell = {
        'Operation': '操作', 'Approach': '方法', 'Description': '说明', 'Pitfall': '坑点', 'Detail': '详情',
        'Tool Slug': 'Tool Slug', 'Find tools': '查找工具', 'Connect': '连接', 'Execute': '执行',
        'Bulk ops': '批量操作', 'Full schema': '完整 schema',
        'Always search first': '始终先搜索', 'Check connection': '检查连接',
        'Schema compliance': '遵循 schema', 'Memory parameter': 'memory 参数',
        'Session reuse': '复用 session', 'Pagination': '分页',
    }
    if protected in exact_cell:
        protected = exact_cell[protected]
    else:
        # Conservative phrase replacements outside protected spans.
        for en, zh in sorted(phrase_map, key=lambda x: len(x[0]), reverse=True):
            protected = re.sub(r'(?<![A-Za-z0-9_])' + re.escape(en) + r'(?![A-Za-z0-9_])', zh, protected)

    # Clean common mixed-language fragments.
    cleanups = [
        ('自动化 ', '自动化 '),
        ('通过  Rube MCP', '通过 Rube MCP'),
        ('toolkit 文档', 'toolkit 文档'),
        ('工具s', '工具'),
        ('操作s', '操作'),
        ('任务s', '任务'),
        ('记录s', '记录'),
        ('工作流s', '工作流'),
        ('参数s', '参数'),
        ('示例s', '示例'),
        ('坑点s', '坑点'),
        ('说明s', '说明'),
        ('fields', '字段'),
        ('field', '字段'),
        ('values', '值'),
        ('value', '值'),
        ('format', '格式'),
        ('formats', '格式'),
        ('status', '状态'),
        ('connection', 'connection'),
        ('connections', 'connections'),
    ]
    for a, b in cleanups:
        protected = protected.replace(a, b)

    return lead_ws + unprotect(protected, parts) + trail_ws

def translate_heading(line):
    m = re.match(r'^(#{1,6})\s+(.*?)(\s*)$', line)
    if not m:
        return None
    hashes, title, tail = m.groups()
    if title in heading_map:
        return f'{hashes} {heading_map[title]}{tail}'
    if title in subheading_exact:
        return f'{hashes} {subheading_exact[title]}{tail}'
    # Preserve app/product names but translate common generated heading words.
    t = title
    t = re.sub(r'^(.+?) Automation via Rube MCP$', r'\1 Automation via Rube MCP（自动化）', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^(.+?) Automation$', r'\1 Automation（自动化）', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^Step (\d+): Discover Available Tools$', r'步骤 \1：发现可用工具', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^Step (\d+): Check Connection$', r'步骤 \1：检查连接', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^Step (\d+): Execute Tools$', r'步骤 \1：执行工具', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Manage (.+)$', r'\1. 管理 \2', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Create (.+)$', r'\1. 创建 \2', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Update (.+)$', r'\1. 更新 \2', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Read (.+)$', r'\1. 读取 \2', t)
    t = re.sub(r'^([0-9]+)\. Format (.+)$', r'\1. 格式化 \2', t)
    t = translate_sentence(t)
    return f'{hashes} {t}{tail}'

def translate_table(line):
    if '|' not in line or not line.lstrip().startswith('|'):
        return None
    if re.match(r'^\s*\|?\s*:?-{2,}:?\s*(\|\s*:?-{2,}:?\s*)+\|?\s*$', line):
        return line
    trailing = '\n' if line.endswith('\n') else ''
    raw = line[:-1] if trailing else line
    parts = raw.split('|')
    out = []
    for i, cell in enumerate(parts):
        if i == 0 or i == len(parts)-1:
            out.append(cell)
        else:
            left = re.match(r'^\s*', cell).group(0)
            right = re.search(r'\s*$', cell).group(0)
            core = cell.strip()
            out.append(left + translate_sentence(core) + right)
    return '|'.join(out) + trailing

def translate_yaml_line(line):
    if line.startswith('description:'):
        prefix, val = line.split(':', 1)
        stripped = val.strip()
        quote = ''
        if len(stripped) >= 2 and stripped[0] == stripped[-1] and stripped[0] in ('"', "'"):
            quote = stripped[0]
            inner = stripped[1:-1]
        else:
            inner = stripped
        zh = translate_sentence(inner).replace('"', '\\"')
        if quote:
            return f'{prefix}: {quote}{zh}{quote}\n'
        return f'{prefix}: {zh}\n'
    if 'short-description:' in line:
        prefix, val = line.split(':', 1)
        stripped = val.strip()
        zh = translate_sentence(stripped.strip('"\''))
        return f'{prefix}: {zh}\n'
    return line

def translate_text(text):
    lines = text.splitlines(True)
    out = []
    in_code = False
    in_yaml = False
    yaml_count = 0
    for idx, line in enumerate(lines):
        stripped = line.strip()
        if idx == 0 and stripped == '---':
            in_yaml = True
            yaml_count = 1
            out.append(line)
            continue
        if in_yaml:
            if stripped == '---':
                yaml_count += 1
                if yaml_count == 2:
                    in_yaml = False
                out.append(line)
            else:
                out.append(translate_yaml_line(line))
            continue
        if stripped.startswith('```'):
            in_code = not in_code
            out.append(line)
            continue
        if in_code:
            out.append(line)
            continue
        h = translate_heading(line)
        if h is not None:
            out.append(h)
            continue
        tbl = translate_table(line)
        if tbl is not None:
            out.append(tbl)
            continue
        # Preserve thematic separators exactly.
        if stripped in ('---', '***'):
            out.append(line)
            continue
        out.append(translate_sentence(line))
    return ''.join(out)

count = 0
for src in sorted(SRC.glob('*.md')):
    dest = DEST / src.name
    dest.write_text(translate_text(src.read_text(encoding='utf-8')), encoding='utf-8')
    count += 1
print(f'translated composio files: {count}')
PY

content.title:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT='/Users/bytedance/Documents/Obsidian Vault/awesome-codex-skills'
REPO='/tmp/awesome-codex-skills'
TMP='/tmp/awesome-codex-skills-restructure'
rm -rf "$TMP"
mkdir -p "$TMP/en/top-level" "$TMP/zh/top-level"

# Move current flattened SKILL translations into real skill folders.
for lang in en zh; do
  srcdir="$ROOT/$lang/top-level"
  destdir="$TMP/$lang/top-level"
  find "$srcdir" -maxdepth 1 -name '*.md' -type f | sort | while IFS= read -r src; do
    name=$(basename "$src" .md)
    mkdir -p "$destdir/$name"
    cp "$src" "$destdir/$name/SKILL.md"
  done
done

# Copy all associated top-level skill files, excluding SKILL.md, into both language trees.
find "$REPO" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d ! -name '.git' ! -name 'composio-skills' | sort | while IFS= read -r skilldir; do
  name=$(basename "$skilldir")
  test -f "$skilldir/SKILL.md" || continue
  for lang in en zh; do
    mkdir -p "$TMP/$lang/top-level/$name"
    (cd "$skilldir" && find . -type f ! -name 'SKILL.md' -print0) | while IFS= read -r -d '' rel; do
      mkdir -p "$TMP/$lang/top-level/$name/$(dirname "$rel")"
      cp "$skilldir/$rel" "$TMP/$lang/top-level/$name/$rel"
    done
  done
done

# Replace language trees atomically enough for this local workspace.
rm -rf "$ROOT/en/top-level" "$ROOT/zh/top-level"
mv "$TMP/en/top-level" "$ROOT/en/top-level"
mv "$TMP/zh/top-level" "$ROOT/zh/top-level"
rm -rf "$TMP"

from pathlib import Path
ROOT = Path('/Users/bytedance/Documents/Obsidian Vault/awesome-codex-skills')
COMMIT = '9c9da64cf1bbea611d43dd14a10788d55369b353'

def skill_dirs(lang):
    return sorted([p for p in (ROOT/lang/'top-level').iterdir() if p.is_dir() and (p/'SKILL.md').exists()], key=lambda p:p.name)

def attachment_count(d):
    return sum(1 for p in d.rglob('*') if p.is_file() and p.name != 'SKILL.md')

en_dirs = skill_dirs('en')
zh_dirs = skill_dirs('zh')

en = []
en.append('# Awesome Codex Skills Raw (English)\n\n')
en.append('- Source: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills\n')
en.append(f'- Commit: `{COMMIT}`\n')
en.append('- Imported: 2026-05-25\n')
en.append('- Scope: top-level curated skills only. `composio-skills/` is excluded.\n')
en.append('- Structure: each skill keeps the original folder shape where available, including scripts, references, examples, assets, and licenses.\n')
en.append(f'- Total: {len(en_dirs)} skill folders.\n\n')
en.append('## Skills\n\n')
for d in en_dirs:
    n = attachment_count(d)
    suffix = f' ({n} attachment files)' if n else ''

zh.append(f'- Total: {len(zh_dirs)} translated skill folders.\n\n')
zh.append('## Skills\n\n')
for d in zh_dirs:
    n = attachment_count(d)
    suffix = f'（{n} 个附件文件）' if n else ''
    zh.append(f'- [{d.name}](top-level/{d.name}/SKILL.md){suffix}\n')
(ROOT/'zh'/'index_zh.md').write_text(''.join(zh), encoding='utf-8')

root = []
root.append('# Awesome Codex Skills\n\n')
root.append('- Source: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills\n')
root.append(f'- Commit: `{COMMIT}`\n')
root.append('- Scope: top-level curated skills only; `composio-skills/` has been removed.\n')

root.append('## Structure\n\n')
root.append('- `en/top-level/<skill>/SKILL.md`: English raw skill, with original associated files.\n')
root.append('- `zh/top-level/<skill>/SKILL.md`: Chinese translated skill, with original associated files copied unchanged.\n')

print('zh attachments', sum(attachment_count(d) for d in zh_dirs))
